div.style: position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #120e2e 0%, #080616 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 999999; transition: opacity 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), visibility 0.6s; opacity: 1; visibility: visible;
text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 140px; height: 60px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(124, 77, 255, 0.2) 0%, rgba(0, 188, 212, 0) 70%); filter: blur(10px); animation: pulse-glow 2s infinite ease-in-out;

img.style: height: 48px; width: auto; position: relative; z-index: 1; animation: pulse-logo 2s infinite ease-in-out;

div.style: display: none; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Inter', sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.5px; position: relative; z-index: 1;
width: 160px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; position: relative;

height: 100%; width: 50%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7C4DFF 0%, #00BCD4 100%); border-radius: 999px; position: absolute; left: -50%; animation: loading-bar 1.8s infinite cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 188, 212, 0.5);

span.style: color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; animation: pulse-text 1.8s infinite ease-in-out;
